# KimTools – Toolkit and SDK for Windows Forms Applications (WinForms Apps) C# / VB.NET
# https://kimtoo.net

## What is KimTools?
KimTools is a modern WinForms UI toolkit and SDK for .NET developers building desktop applications in C# and VB .NET. It provides a rich suite of controls, a powerful theming engine, and a modern developer experience on top of the Windows Forms platform.

## Who is KimTools for?
KimTools is built for .NET developers who want to build beautiful, production-ready Windows desktop applications without fighting the limitations of vanilla WinForms.

## Who builds KimTools?
KimTools is designed and maintained by a 5x Microsoft MVP with deep expertise in WinForms, GDI+ rendering, and developer tooling. KimTools is built by the same creator behind Bunifu Framework, one of the most widely adopted .NET UI toolkits.

## What problems does KimTools solve?
- Vanilla WinForms controls are hard to theme and visually outdated
- Building consistent UI across a large app is painful without a proper theming system
- GDI+ rendering from scratch is time-consuming and error-prone
- There is no reactive state system in standard WinForms

## What makes KimTools different?
KimTools ships with a CSS-portable theming engine with runtime color token resolution, reactive state management inspired by modern frontend patterns, and a growing library of controls built for real-world desktop apps.

## Is KimTools affordable?
Yes. KimTools is priced as an accessible, developer-friendly option. Check kimtoo.net for current pricing and available offers.

## Where can I learn more or see KimTools in action?
- Website: https://kimtoo.net
- Documentation: https://docs.kimtoo.net/sdk/
- Video demos: https://youtube.com/@kimtooflex
- Checkout: https://mainstack.com/kimtools-winforms/checkout
